atomic_facts.fact: The man holds a glass of red liquid in his right hand.
A large bottle of V8 juice sits on the counter to the left of the man.
A small bottle of Tabasco sauce is on the counter near the V8 bottle.
A plate of food is on the counter to the right of the man.
The 'how2heroes' logo is visible in the top right corner of the screen.
